case_title: ELISABETH LINSKY VS. VERONICA CHRISTINA PETERSON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LINSKY, ELISABETH AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSON, VERONICA CHRISTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2016 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM (FEE $100.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINSKY, ELISABETH SERVED MAR-28-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSON, VERONICA CHRISTINA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LINSKY, ELISABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETERSON, VERONICA CHRISTINA $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,175.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LINSKY, ELISABETH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.
